formulas.formula: Trade Revenue + Related Party Revenue = Total Revenue
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade
Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
Total Sales and other operating revenues
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade + Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
formulas.result_label: Total Sales and other operating revenues

formulas.formula: Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
formulas.operation: Cost of sales + Impairments + Selling, general and administrative expenses + Research and development expenses
formulas.result_label: Total operating costs and expenses

formulas.formula: Total Revenue - Total operating costs = Operating income
components: Total Sales and other operating revenues
formulas.operation: Total Sales and other operating revenues - Total operating costs and expenses
formulas.result_label: Operating income

formulas.formula: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other income = Pre-equity income
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
formulas.operation: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other (expense) income, net
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes

formulas.formula: Pre-equity income + Equity income = Pre-tax income
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes + Income (loss) from equity investments
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before income taxes

formulas.formula: Pre-tax income - Tax = Income from continuing operations
components: Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before income taxes - Provision for income taxes
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations

formulas.formula: Continuing operations + Discontinued operations = Net income
components: Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.result_label: Net income

formulas.formula: Net income - Redeemable NCI dividends = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
components: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders

formulas.formula: Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash + Accounts receivable - Trade, net + Accounts receivable - Related parties + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.result_label: Total current assets

formulas.formula: PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
formulas.operation: Property, plant and equipment (gross) - Less: Accumulated depreciation
formulas.result_label: Property, plant and equipment, net

formulas.formula: Current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + Property, plant and equipment, net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Other assets
formulas.result_label: Total assets

formulas.formula: Current maturities LTD + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Current maturities of long-term debt + Short-term debt + Accounts payable - Trade + Accounts payable - Related parties + Accrued and other current liabilities
formulas.result_label: Total current liabilities

formulas.formula: Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI - Treasury stock = Total Company equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Ordinary shares + Additional paid-in capital + Retained earnings + Accumulated other comprehensive loss - Treasury stock
formulas.result_label: Total Company share of shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Company equity + NCI = Total equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total Company share of shareholders equity + Non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Total equity

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total liabilities + Redeemable NCI + Total equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable non-controlling interests + Total equity
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

formulas.formula: Net income + D&A + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC + (-Equity income) + Distributions + Deferred tax + Working capital + Other = CFO
components: Distributions of earnings, net of tax
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Depreciation and amortization + Impairments + Amortization of debt-related costs + Share-based compensation - Equity income + Distributions of earnings, net of tax + Deferred income tax provision - Accounts receivable (change) - Inventories (change) + Accounts payable (change) + Other, net (operating)
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: (-Capex) + Hedge proceeds - Hedge payments - Other investing = CFI
components: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment
Proceeds from settlement of net investment hedges
Payments for settlement of net investment hedges
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from settlement of net investment hedges - Expenditures for property, plant and equipment - Payments for settlement of net investment hedges - Other, net (investing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: (-Repurchases) + (-Dividends) + Debt issuance - Debt costs - Debt repayment - CP net - (-Collateral) + Other = CFF
components: Net (repayments of) proceeds from commercial paper
Collateral received from interest rate derivatives
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Issuance of long-term debt - Repurchases of Company ordinary shares - Dividends paid - common stock - Payments of debt issuance costs - Repayment of long-term debt + Net (repayments of) proceeds from commercial paper - Collateral received from interest rate derivatives + Other, net (financing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
Increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities + Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
formulas.result_label: Increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash + Change = Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period
Increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period + Increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period

cross_statement_checks.check: Retained earnings change on BS matches Net income - Dividends - Redeemable NCI dividends - SBC charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.note: Retained earnings changed from 9195 to 9917, a change of +722. Net income 1936 - Common dividends 1204 - Redeemable NCI dividends 5 - SBC net charge to retained earnings 5 = 722. Shareholders equity statement shows SBC impact of -5 on retained earnings in 9-month period. The math reconciles: 1936 - 1204 - 5 - 5 = 722. Match confirmed.

operating_leases.current_location: Current portion of operating lease liability is not separately disclosed on the face of the balance sheet. It is likely embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities (2,533). The XBRL tag us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList was not found in the provided undimensioned XBRL facts. Only the noncurrent portion us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent of 1,397 is disclosed as a separate balance sheet line. Total operating lease liability cannot be confirmed from available data.
operating_leases.flag: Current operating lease liability not separately disclosed; hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities

components.label: Amortization of debt-related costs (financing costs and discounts)

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement shows D&A of 1,154 and separately amortization of debt-related costs of 7. The 1,154 is the primary D&A used for operations. Segment note confirms 1,154 total D&A for nine months 2023.

accounts_payable.combined_with: Split between Trade (NonrelatedParty 3,121) and Related parties (453) on balance sheet face
accounts_payable.detail: Trade AP (nonrelated party) = 3,121; Related party AP = 453; Total = 3,574. Note 6 discloses that as of September 30, 2023 Accounts payable-Trade included 64 million payable to suppliers in the supply chain finance program.

accounts_receivable.combined_with: Split between Trade net (NonrelatedParty 3,704) and Related parties (137) on balance sheet face
accounts_receivable.note: Trade AR net of allowance 3,704; Related party AR 137. Note 4 states allowance for credit losses of 6 million as of September 30, 2023. Pure trade AR gross would be approximately 3,710.

capex.note: CF statement line 'Expenditures for property, plant and equipment' = 1,047 for nine months 2023 per us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid was found in the provided XBRL facts. Segment note also confirms 1,047 total for nine months 2023.

acquisitions.note: No acquisition-related cash flow line items appear in the provided CF statement or XBRL facts for the nine months ended September 30, 2023. The filing notes the April 2023 acquisition of the remaining 50% of Quality Circular Polymers in the MD&A text, but no corresponding cash flow XBRL fact for business acquisition payments was found in the undimensioned facts provided. This may be included in the 'Other, net' investing line of (186) million.

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt per balance sheet us-gaap:ShortTermBorrowings = 112, consisting entirely of precious metal financings. Commercial paper and receivables facility had zero balances at September 30, 2023.

sbc.note: Share-based compensation per CF statement us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation = 71 for nine months 2023. No breakdown by function (cost of sales, SGA) was found in the provided XBRL facts.

interest_expense.source: Gross interest expense us-gaap:InterestExpense = 356 per income statement for nine months 2023. Interest income us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = 88. Net interest expense = 268 as confirmed by MD&A table showing 'Interest expense, net' of 268 in the nine months 2023 EBITDA reconciliation.

tax_rate.note: Tax expense 508 / Pretax income 2,448 = 20.76% effective rate for nine months 2023. XBRL confirms us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations = 0.208 (20.8%) for the nine month period. Pretax income is positive; no fallback needed.

inventory.note: Inventory breakdown per Note 5: Finished goods 3,154 + Work-in-process 264 + Raw materials and supplies 1,493 = Total 4,911 as of September 30, 2023. All components confirmed by XBRL tags us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves, us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsAndSuppliesNetOfReserves.

formula_checks.formula: Trade Revenue + Related Party Revenue = Total Revenue
Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
Total Revenue - Total operating costs = Operating income
Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other income = Pre-equity income
Pre-equity income + Equity income = Pre-tax income
Pre-tax income - Tax = Income from continuing operations
Continuing operations + Discontinued operations = Net income
Net income - Redeemable NCI dividends = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
Current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
Current maturities LTD + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI - Treasury stock = Total Company equity
Company equity + NCI = Total equity
Total assets = Total liabilities + Redeemable NCI + Total equity
Net income + D&A + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC + (-Equity income) + Distributions + Deferred tax + Working capital + Other = CFO
(-Capex) + Hedge proceeds - Hedge payments - Other investing = CFI
(-Repurchases) + (-Dividends) + Debt issuance - Debt costs - Debt repayment - CP net - (-Collateral) + Other = CFF
CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Change in cash
Beginning cash + Change = Ending cash
